findings: Existing local security evidence is acceptable for VS3 continuation only.

Before final product release, VS3-P, real on-prem readiness, or any security acceptance claim, an independent security review and retest must verify tenant isolation, policy enforcement, egress boundaries, connector permissions, tool authority, prompt-injection resistance, audit coverage, findings remediation, and retest evidence.
This record does not claim independent security acceptance, production/on-prem readiness, VS3-P readiness, real network readiness, live provider readiness, or final release readiness.
redaction_note: No raw secrets, provider credentials, private keys, session cookies, bearer tokens, exploit payload secrets, live provider payloads, production network data, or unredacted production/customer data are included. This record references local security evidence only and requires independent review and retest before final product release, VS3-P, real on-prem readiness, or security acceptance claim.
tested_bypass_paths: tenant isolation and RLS local proof
policy enforcement and OPA local proof
tool authority and registry local proof
audit coverage and overclaim local proof
future-required: independent findings remediation and retest before final release
topology_scope: Local VS3 security evidence and local/on-prem development continuation only. Representative production-like or real on-prem topology remains outside this approval and must be independently reviewed and retested before final product release, VS3-P, real on-prem readiness, or security acceptance claim.
